subcodes.first_line: O Jinab-i-Aqa-Bala, upon thee be the glory and praise of Baha'u'llah! God willing, mayst thou abide within the Cave of His divine protection and care [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب آقا بالا علیک بهاء الله و ثنائه انشاء الله در کهف حفظ و حمایت الهیه
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @naming of children; of individuals
